what: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: ggseg 2.0 atlas package providing brain atlas data ggseg ecosystem. data-package custom functions.

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: data/*.rda — Unified ggseg_atlas objects (2D + 3D one object) R/data.R — Roxygen2 documentation atlas R/ggsegSchaefer-package.R — Package-level docs, imports ggseg.formats R/sysdata.rda — Internal palette data (brain_pals) data-raw/ — Scripts generated/converted atlas data

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: package depends ggseg.formats provides ggseg_atlas class. atlas objects work ggseg::geom_brain() (2D) ggseg3d::ggseg3d() (3D).

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: Update docs: devtools::document() Run tests: devtools::test() (testthat edition 3, describe/style) Full check: devtools::check() Build pkgdown site: pkgdown::build_site()

title: Quick instructions for AI coding agents working on ggsegSchaefer
text: code comments except necessary workarounds Roxygen2 markdown enabled Tests use describe/BDD style vdiffr visual regression NEWS.md tracks user-facing changes (CI/pkgdown changes) URLs point ggseg GitHub org (LCBC-UiO)

what: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: package contains dataset plotting Schaefer cortical atlas (version 0.17.1) ggseg ggseg3d. Now includes sets 17 7 network atlas, parcellations 100:1000.

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: best experience installing ggsegSchaefer ggseg r-universe: can install released version ggsegSchaefer GitHub :
code: # Enable this universe options(repos = c(     ggsegverse = 'https://ggsegverse.r-universe.dev',     CRAN = 'https://cloud.r-project.org'))  # Install some packages install.packages('ggsegSchaefer') # install.packages("remotes") remotes::install_github("LCBC-UiO/ggsegSchaefer")

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: library(ggsegSchaefer) library(ggseg) library(ggseg3d) library(ggplot2) library(dplyr) #>  #> Attaching package: 'dplyr' #> The following objects are masked from 'package:stats': #>  #>     filter, lag #> The following objects are masked from 'package:base': #>  #>     intersect, setdiff, setequal, union

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
code: ggseg3d(atlas = schaefer7_400_3d, surface = "inflated") %>%    pan_camera("right lateral")

title: Schaefer Atlas for the ggseg Ecosystem
text: FreeSurfer annotation files data-raw/ downloaded ThomasYeoLab/CBIG GitHub repository: Files follow pattern {lh|rh}.Schaefer2018_{N}Parcels_{7|17}Networks_order.annot N = 100, 200, …, 1000. fsaverage space (163k vertices). License: MIT (per CBIG repository). Reference: Schaefer , Kong R, Gordon EM, Laumann , Zuo XN, Holmes AJ, Eickhoff SB, Yeo BTT (2018). Local-Global Parcellation Human Cerebral Cortex Intrinsic Functional Connectivity MRI. Cerebral Cortex, 28(9), 3095-3114. doi:[10.1093/cercor/bhx179](https://doi.org/10.1093/cercor/bhx179) Please note ‘ggsegSchaefer’ project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.
code: stable_projects/brain_parcellation/Schaefer2018_LocalGlobal/   Parcellations/FreeSurfer5.3/fsaverage/label/

what: ggsegSchaefer: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegSchaefer-package
title: ggsegSchaefer: Schaefer Atlas for the 'ggseg' Ecosystem — ggsegSchaefer-package
text: Schaefer cortical atlas 'ggseg' ecosystem. Provides unified 'ggseg_atlas' objects 2D polygon geometry 3D vertex indices, use 'ggseg' 'ggseg3d'. Includes 7-network 17-network parcellations resolutions 100 1000 parcels.

title: Schaefer 17-Network 300-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_300
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 300 parcels aligned 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 17-Network 600-Parcel Atlas — schaefer17_600
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 600 parcels aligned 17 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 7-Network 300-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_300
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 300 parcels aligned 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 7-Network 400-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_400
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 400 parcels aligned 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 7-Network 500-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_500
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 500 parcels aligned 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 7-Network 600-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_600
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 600 parcels aligned 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: Schaefer 7-Network 900-Parcel Atlas — schaefer7_900
text: Brain atlas Schaefer et al. (2018) local-global parcellation human cerebral cortex 900 parcels aligned 7 resting-state networks (Yeo et al., 2011). Contains 2D polygon geometry ggseg::geom_brain() 3D vertex indices ggseg3d::ggseg3d().

title: ggsegSchaefer 2.0.0
text: 20 Schaefer atlas objects (schaefer7_100 schaefer7_1000 schaefer17_100 schaefer17_1000) now ggseg_atlas objects (ggseg.formats) containing 2D 3D data. separate _3d objects removed. Use ggplot() + ggseg::geom_brain(atlas = schaefer7_400) 2D plots ggseg3d::ggseg3d(atlas = schaefer7_400) 3D plots – object. ggseg.formats now hard dependency (Depends). Package URLs updated LCBC-UiO ggseg GitHub organisation.
